div.head: Memorandum by the Under Secretary of State (Phillips)
div.p:
During his call this morning the Chinese Minister asked whether the Government had reached any decision with respect to sending a
financial attaché to China. He expressed earnestly his hope that we would find it possible to do so.
I explained to the Minister that the matter was still undecided and was a subject which was, even now, being discussed with the Treasury Department. I said I hoped we would reach a decision shortly.
